blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: Is there any chance Miro will regain her memories?

blocks.speaker: Monga
blocks.content: There is.
Miro, with Arius, was talking to Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Monga
blocks.content: If her lost memories manifested as a child, we could wait until she grows up. I think it might take about 30 years.

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: 30 years.
In the dream, Gaold could wait as long as needed.

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: I don't know. What's the right thing to do?
Since there was no way out, he had plenty of time to think.

blocks.speaker: Miro
blocks.content: Brother. Brother.
Miro waved her hand in front of Shirone's eyes.

blocks.speaker: Miro
blocks.content: Say something. Is watching the sea that interesting?
Gaold and the others watched.

blocks.speaker: Monga
blocks.content: Master…
Monga's face was filled with sadness.

blocks.speaker: Monga
blocks.content: He did so much in reality. Nothing was easy. He sacrificed everything and fought for humanity.

blocks.speaker: Sein
blocks.content: Now he's doing nothing.

blocks.speaker: Monga
blocks.content: Yes. Usually, the most earnest desires are fulfilled within the dream barrier, but Yahweh's dream is quite dry. It's proof of how intense reality was.
Monga's shoulders slumped.

blocks.speaker: Monga
blocks.content: It's a pity. This place is like level 1.5 of the abyss. Just a bit further, and we could have reached Ymir. He had the ability.
Shirone's strike against Leviathan in the second layer had been conveyed to Monga.

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: He definitely surpassed infinity. In a normal state, he might have been able to defeat Ymir.
Of course, since this was Ymir's dream, nothing could be said with 100% certainty.

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: Hey, he's not saying anything.
As Shirone remained silent, Miro sat next to him.

blocks.speaker: Gangnan
blocks.content: Why is he a dog? He was a person in the dream.

blocks.speaker: Monga
blocks.content: He lost his reason. It's a good judgment. If memories are melted away, he focuses on instinct. That dog probably senses where we are. Not in clear human language, but instinctively.
As Miro drew in the sand, only the waves endlessly crashed.

blocks.speaker: Miro
blocks.content: …waiting.
Hearing the voice beside her, Miro turned her head.

blocks.speaker: Miro
blocks.content: What?

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: Waiting.
For the first time, Shirone spoke, and Gaold's group hurried over.

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: Master! Are you conscious?
Monga asked, but silence followed.

blocks.speaker: Miro
blocks.content: What are you waiting for?
In response to Miro's question, Shirone pointed to the endless horizon over the sea.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Something huge.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: And probably… The most powerful thing in this world.
Monga looked at the sea in shock.

blocks.speaker: Monga
blocks.content: Ah…
An unexpected variable was that they were near the end of the abyss.

blocks.speaker: Monga
blocks.content: Ymir is coming.
The next morning.
Unlike the busy workers, the officials arrived later than the previous day.

blocks.speaker: Laska
blocks.content: Ugh, my stomach hurts.
Since the incident where people's positions changed in the banquet hall, the schedules of various countries had been disrupted.

blocks.speaker: Laska
blocks.content: Last night was amazing.
Countries that didn't attend had no idea what was discussed in the pleasure spots.

blocks.speaker: Lupist
blocks.content: Arachne seems to be focusing on Jive.
Lupist, hearing the report from his aide, drew arrows on the relationship chart on the blackboard.

blocks.speaker: Lupist
blocks.content: I heard the banquet lasted until dawn. There must have been some deals. From today, sides will be drawn.

blocks.speaker: Albino
blocks.content: How was the hospitality?

blocks.speaker: Lupist
blocks.content: I didn't go.
Lupist turned around.

blocks.speaker: Lupist
blocks.content: I was analyzing the incident in the banquet hall. But some Tormian officials attended. They said there was no special information exchange…

blocks.speaker: Plu
blocks.content: VIPs are different.
At Plu's words, Lupist nodded.

blocks.speaker: Lupist
blocks.content: To get their information, we need to send our people. But securing allies comes first. There's a country trying to make contact.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Which one?

blocks.speaker: Lupist
blocks.content: The Southern and Mun Kingdoms. The Southern is very interested in Yahweh. Meanwhile, the Mun Kingdom has shifted from hostility to friendliness. Last night's incident must have influenced them.
Lupist pointed to the blackboard.

blocks.speaker: Lupist
blocks.content: But this isn't enough to decide the outcome. Alliances can break anytime. The country Tormia needs most now is Corona. The probability is quite high.
Corona is managed by the Ivory Tower, and Shirone holds the highest authority there.

blocks.speaker: Lupist
blocks.content: There has been no contact yet. The factional strife within the Ivory Tower must be severe.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: They arrived this morning.
Everyone turned to Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I'll negotiate directly.
The Kingdom of Corona
Even after the Holy War began, the army led by the First Legion Commander Baal did not cease its attacks.

blocks.speaker: Laska
blocks.content: Phew.
The snow piled on the plateau was stained with the blood of both demons and humans, creating a repulsive color.
The man who had annihilated 3,000 demons had a cold expression and a long scar running along his lips.
Thud. Thud.
He irregularly stabbed the bodies with a knife to check for signs of life and then cut off a demon's arm.
Sitting on the corpse, he bit into the flesh.
The sound of chewing was followed by him sucking the blood from the severed end.

blocks.speaker: Laska
blocks.content: Ah, that's good.
The man's name was Laska.
He was a three-star resident of the Human Safety Enforcement Department, where Minerva was one of the Five Great Stars.

blocks.speaker: Laska
blocks.content: Captain.
Laska's aide, Staff, walked through the knee-deep snow.

blocks.speaker: Staff
blocks.content: Big sister wants you to return to the base. You've been out too long. We're running out of supplies.

blocks.speaker: Laska
blocks.content: Supplies, huh.
Laska, chewing on the flesh, offered the severed arm to Staff.

blocks.speaker: Staff
blocks.content: Want some?

blocks.speaker: Staff
blocks.content: No thanks. You've already had a bite.

blocks.speaker: Laska
blocks.content: …You're not normal either.
As they teleported down the mountain, Corona's soldiers were engaged in skirmishes.

blocks.speaker: Minerva
blocks.content: You idiot! Where have you been?

blocks.speaker: Laska
blocks.content: I was tracking the remnants. What's all this?
Minerva's jet shot out at incredible speed, piercing through the demons.

blocks.speaker: Minerva
blocks.content: Can't you see? Baal has started pressuring the Ivory Tower. We can't hold out for more than three days.

blocks.speaker: Laska
blocks.content: Let's make peace. What's the point of this? If we fight alongside the Law Department, we can manage.
That's why I called you.

blocks.speaker: Minerva
blocks.content: Go. Shirone is here.
Entering the tent, Laska found Shirone sitting there.

blocks.speaker: Laska
blocks.content: Welcome, Great Star.
While all the stars respected Shirone, Laska's greeting felt somewhat irreverent.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Yes. I want to meet the Grand Star. Minerva said you could do it, Laska.

blocks.speaker: Laska
blocks.content: This woman…!

blocks.speaker: Laska
blocks.content: Of course, with his ability, it was possible, but it would likely cost him his life.

blocks.speaker: Laska
blocks.content: How did I get involved with such a woman?

blocks.speaker: Laska
blocks.content: Meeting the Grand Star is very difficult right now. She's imprisoned within the law.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Imprisoned?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Who could do that? How could anyone imprison the Grand Star?

blocks.speaker: Laska
blocks.content: Sing.
Laska's expression darkened.

blocks.speaker: Laska
blocks.content: With the combined power of Yin and Yang, Sing is invincible. She enforces everything.

blocks.speaker: Laska
blocks.content: The Grand Star is imprisoned.

blocks.speaker: Laska
blocks.content: Let's try anyway. I thought there was no solution as it is. Please resolve this, Great Star.
Laska took Shirone to the Ivory Tower.
Due to the wartime state, they had to use different magic circles, and security was tight.
The Corona officials, who usually greeted them with smiles, were just watching cautiously.
Reaching the 230th floor of the Ivory Tower, they found a steel door with various magic circuits.

blocks.speaker: Laska
blocks.content: The Grand Star is here?

blocks.speaker: Laska
blocks.content: Yes. As you can see, it's a self-destruct circuit. If you try to break it by force, the Grand Star will be in danger.
Shirone frowned.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Sing. She's decisive but not cruel. Why show such hostility to the Grand Star?

blocks.speaker: Laska
blocks.content: Don't. The moment Hexa's power touches it, it's over. The only way is to deactivate the magic circuits from inside.

blocks.speaker: Laska
blocks.content: The pinnacle of thievery, Stealth.
With the ability that once robbed countless vaults worldwide, he became immaterial while holding his breath.

blocks.speaker: Laska
blocks.content: Impressive.
Laska, now as hazy as smoke, walked towards the steel door with puffed cheeks.
Like a lie, his form entered, and moments later, the circuits disappeared.

blocks.speaker: Laska
blocks.content: Phew.
As the door opened, Laska, emitting smoke from his entire body, collapsed.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Are you okay?

blocks.speaker: Laska
blocks.content: More or less. Even as immaterial, all I could do was avoid triggering the self-destruct circuit. The mental shock is considerable.
His mind was shredded, and he wouldn't be able to move for a while.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Grand Star.
Passing Laska, Shirone approached the Grand Star, who was sitting neatly at the end of the room.

blocks.speaker: Grand Star
blocks.content: You finally came.

blocks.speaker: Grand Star
blocks.content: What happened? Sing imprisoning you is a rebellion.
A cold voice interrupted.

blocks.speaker: Sing
blocks.content: Stop, Shirone.
Turning around, Shirone saw Sing guarding the door with Yin and Yang.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Sing, what are you doing?

blocks.speaker: Sing
blocks.content: Don't be foolish. This is for you. For humanity.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: How is imprisoning the Grand Star for humanity? The Ivory Tower has protected humanity through countless crises. The Grand Star is at the center of that.

blocks.speaker: Sing
blocks.content: The situation is different now.

blocks.speaker: Sing
blocks.content: When the outside world opens, Argones will activate. And the Grand Star is a manager of the same level as Argones. Do you really think… she will protect you until the end?
When Shirone didn't answer, Sing asked the Grand Star.

blocks.speaker: Sing
blocks.content: Grand Star, tell us yourself. After Argones activates, will you still side with humanity?

blocks.speaker: Grand Star
blocks.content: Yes. I am the avatar of the planet and the mother of humanity. I will protect humanity until the end.

blocks.speaker: Sing
blocks.content: Lies.

blocks.speaker: Sing
blocks.content: I trust no one. In this world, only I am real. All other beings are illusions. Therefore, Grand Star, you are the same.
As Sing extended her hand, Yin and Yang pushed their power into her with the law of Yin and Yang.
As the Ivory Tower shook, Shirone blocked with Miracle Stream.

blocks.speaker: Sing
blocks.content: Stop. Don't do something you'll regret.

blocks.speaker: Sing
blocks.content: You fool! Don't you understand? Do you know how much danger your judgment could bring?
Shirone's expression remained steady, and Xing finally decided to use force.
Boom!
At that moment, a loud noise erupted from below the Ivory Tower, and Araka from the Internal Affairs Department rushed in.

blocks.speaker: Araka
blocks.content: There's trouble!
The Grand Star asked.

blocks.speaker: Grand Star
blocks.content: Araka, what's happening?

blocks.speaker: Araka
blocks.content: Baal! Baal has led the army of hell and entered. They're currently up to the 12th floor.
Exhausted, Laska blew his bangs up.

blocks.speaker: Laska
blocks.content: I knew this would happen.
